message:
feat(widgets): Add page navigation and scroll helpers to Virtualized

- Add page_up() and page_down() methods for Virtualized<T>
- Add scroll_to_start() and scroll_to_end() aliases
- Add page_up() and page_down() to VirtualizedListState
- Closes bd-14s3: VirtualizedList widget with overscan

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
